Bon Café

Home / Compare / Bon Café
commercial blend arabica premium-commercial

Bon Café

บอน คาเฟ่

4.0
★ ★ ★ ★ ☆
320 reviews
Origin Northern Thailand
Roast Levels light medium dark
Price Range ฿110–180 / 200g
Founded 1988
Formats ground, whole bean, drip bag

One of Thailand's longer-standing premium domestic brands, Bon Café bridges the gap between commercial and specialty coffee with higher-grade Thai arabica sourced from northern highland cooperatives.

Flavor Profile

Well-balanced and nuanced for a commercial brand. Mild fruit brightness, cocoa and walnut midnotes, with a clean, pleasant finish. Good complexity at an accessible price.

Tasting Notes

mild fruit cocoa walnut clean finish

Flavor Breakdown

Body
3/5
Acidity
3/5
Sweetness
3/5
Bitterness
3/5
Aroma
4/5
